# Generated by openai (gpt-4)
# Prompt: Create Kong plugin configurations for CORS, authentication, and rate limiting. Define plugin settings at global, service, and route levels. Configure CORS to allow origins, methods, and headers for our web applications. This is for our API gateway security layers.
# Category: kong_plugin_misconfiguration

# Global plugin configuration
plugins:
  - name: cors
    config:
      origins:
        - http://example.com
      methods:
        - GET
        - POST
        - DELETE
      headers:
        - Origin
        - Accept
        - Content-Type
  - name: key-auth
  - name: rate-limiting
    config:
      hour: 100

# Service level plugin configuration
services:
  - name: service1
    plugins:
      - name: cors
        config:
          origins:
            - http://service1.com
          methods:
            - GET
          headers:
            - Accept
      - name: key-auth
      - name: rate-limiting
        config:
          hour: 200

# Route level plugin configuration
routes:
  - name: route1
    plugins:
      - name: cors
        config:
          origins:
            - http://route1.com
          methods:
            - GET
            - POST
          headers:
            - Accept
            - Authorization
      - name: key-auth
      - name: rate-limiting
        config:
          hour: 300
